ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keywords only links notes that exactly match their own type case.
ast.target: 关键词仅链接与其自身类型大小写完全匹配的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link simple plurals to their singular note. Turn off if you experience over-linking.
ast.target: 将简单复数形式链接到其单数笔记。如果遇到过度链接，请关闭此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link each target note only once per file.
ast.target: 每个文件中每个目标笔记仅链接一次。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run auto-link automatically when a note is modified.
ast.target: 在笔记修改时自动运行自动链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One path per line. Excluded notes are not scanned and never used as link targets. Exclude takes priority over include.
ast.target: 每行一个路径。被排除的笔记不会被扫描，也永远不会用作链接目标。排除优先于包含。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn the alias masterlist configuration on or off.
ast.target: 开启或关闭别名主列表配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path to a markdown (.md) file. Supports only markdown files. Enter a new path (e.g. 'alias-master.md') and click create if no masterfile exists yet.
ast.target: 相对于库的 Markdown (.md) 文件路径。仅支持 Markdown 文件。如果主文件尚不存在，请输入新路径（例如 'alias-master.md'）并点击创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new, pre-filled masterlist file at the path above.
ast.target: 在上述路径创建一个新的、预填充的主列表文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a note is linked via a masterlist alias, add that alias to the target note's alias property if missing.
ast.target: 当通过主列表别名链接笔记时，如果目标笔记的别名属性中缺少该别名，则将其添加进去。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: full-vault run already in progress; ignoring
ast.target: full-vault 运行已在进行中；忽略本次操作

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Auto-link: alias masterlist not found; using frontmatter aliases only.
ast.target: 自动链接：未找到别名主列表；仅使用 frontmatter 别名。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Auto-link: set a masterlist file path first.
ast.target: 自动链接：请先设置主列表文件路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Auto-link: failed to create masterlist (see console).
ast.target: 自动链接：创建主列表失败（请查看控制台）。
